title: Multi-Zone Thermal Decoupling in Array Heater Systems
content: Adjacent heating zones exhibit thermal crosstalk with time constant τ=RC_thermal. An interaction matrix adjusts each zone's effective PID setpoint: SP_i_eff = SP_i - Σ k_ij*(T_j - SP_j). Priority round-robin arbitration prevents simultaneous SSR switching events that would overload a shared power bus and cause voltage droop.
